response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of diverse full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process improvements. His background in internal tooling, automation, and cross-stack problem-solving makes him an exceptional fit despite limited explicit Nest.js mention.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and internal automation tooling, directly matching core responsibilities
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling — including creating open-source testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in resume, though Node.js and architecture experience suggest adaptability
German language skill is only basic, may pose minor communication hurdles in Berlin-based team
Some roles lack detail on team collaboration or product-user alignment, though open-source work implies customer focus
